meaning: n.佛兰德人(语)adj.佛兰德的,佛兰德人(语)的
examples: We decided upon laying the bricks in a flemish bond.
We are obliged to speak in Flemish in all our official meetings.
But the leader of a third Flemish party accused both parties of seeking "Utopia".
With a few French and Italian exceptions, the Iveagh pictures are all English, Flemish and Dutch.
